case_title: THE BERELSON COMPANY VS HYND CAROL ANNE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $888.07 FILED BY THE BERELSON COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT HYND CAROL ANNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-16-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-16-1991, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-15-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HYND CAROL ANNE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE BERELSON COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HYND CAROL ANNE $888.07 PRINCIPAL, $52.03 INTEREST, $10.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $950.10, INTEREST AT THE LEGAL RATE FROM 4/30/91. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT HYND CAROL ANNE

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT HYND CAROL ANNE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT THE BERELSON COMPANY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HYND CAROL ANNE
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $4,251.04 FILED BY HYND CAROL ANNE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT THE BERELSON COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-15-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
